title: Effect variable ?E: instantiation syntax and constraint semantics underdefined
description: The spec introduces ?E for effect polymorphism in higher-order functions. It says '?E is an effect variable; retry has whatever effects f has.' But it does not specify: how a caller explicitly instantiates ?E; whether ?E can be constrained (e.g. ?E must not include Unsafe); whether multiple effect variables in one signature are independent; what the error message looks like when effect unification fails; or how ?E interacts with @pure. Library authors writing combinators using ?E have no complete specification to follow, and will discover edge cases through compiler errors with no recovery path documented.
